zh.Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Carminow於大約1322年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir John Carminow44歲，母親Johanna Glynn30歲。他和Alice Tynten至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1361年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞斯頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰可瓦爾勞斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Carminow于大约1322年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir John Carminow44岁，母亲Johanna Glynn30岁。他和Alice Tynten至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1361年在英国英格兰可瓦爾勞斯頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Carminow was born about 1322, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Carminow, was 44 and his mother, Johanna Glynn, was 30. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Tynten. He died in 1361, in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Carminow est né environ 1322, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Carminow, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Johanna Glynn, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Tynten. Il est décédé en 1361, à Launceston, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Carminow um 1322 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Carminow 44 und seine Mutter Johanna Glynn 30. Er hatte mit Alice Tynten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Carminow è nato il circa 1322 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Carminow, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Glynn, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Tynten. Morì nel 1361, nel Launceston, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Carminowが約1322年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir John Carminowは44歳，母Johanna Glynnは30歳であった。彼はAlice Tyntenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1361年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルラウンセストンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Carminow(이)가 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Carminow(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Glynn(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Alice Tynten(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 로스스턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Ki: Lannstevan, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Carminow nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Carminow, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Glynn, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Tynten. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Carminow родился около 1322 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Carminow было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Glynn, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Tynten. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности лаунсестон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Carminow nació aproximadamente 1322, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Carminow, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Johanna Glynn, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Tynten. Murió en 1361, en Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
